title: Soulection Radio Show #480 (Kaelin Ellis Radio)
content:
Kaelin Ellis takes over the show with exclusives and remixes.

<!--more-->

Follow Kaelin Ellis on [SoundCloud](https://soundcloud.com/kaelinellis), [Twitter](https://twitter.com/kaelinellis), [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/kaelinellis/?hl=en)
